'''Pusat Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Lesser Lantillian Route]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The ''[[M'hendosat]]'' berthed there in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

{{Station-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 14: The Monsters of Dweem]]'' {{1stm}}
